requirement.description: When the driver presses the horn switch, the IC shall immediately transmit the horn switch status on the CAN bus.

test_cases.title: Verify Horn_Switch_Pressed = 1 when pressed
test_cases.precondition: Ignition ON; CAN tool connected; monitoring CAN ID 0x300
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_hrn_001_horn_pressed(can_bus):
    msg = wait_for_message(can_bus, IC_MSG_ID, timeout=2.0)
    value = get_bit(msg.data, 0)
    assert value == 1, f"Expected Horn_Switch_Pressed=1, got {value}"

test_cases.title: Verify Horn_Switch_Pressed = 0 when released
test_cases.precondition: Ignition ON; CAN tool connected; monitoring CAN ID 0x300
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_hrn_002_horn_released(can_bus):
    msg = wait_for_message(can_bus, IC_MSG_ID, timeout=2.0)
    value = get_bit(msg.data, 0)
    assert value == 0, f"Expected Horn_Switch_Pressed=0, got {value}"

test_cases.title: Verify immediate transition from 0 → 1
test_cases.expected_result: Value changes from 0 to 1 in the next transmitted frame
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_hrn_003_press_transition(can_bus):
    baseline = wait_for_message(can_bus, IC_MSG_ID, timeout=2.0)
    assert get_bit(baseline.data, 0) == 0
    next_msg = wait_for_message(can_bus, IC_MSG_ID, timeout=2.0)
    assert get_bit(next_msg.data, 0) == 1

test_cases.title: Verify immediate transition from 1 → 0
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_hrn_004_release_transition(can_bus):
    baseline = wait_for_message(can_bus, IC_MSG_ID, timeout=2.0)
    assert get_bit(baseline.data, 0) == 1
    next_msg = wait_for_message(can_bus, IC_MSG_ID, timeout=2.0)
    assert get_bit(next_msg.data, 0) == 0

test_cases.title: Verify signal stability while horn remains pressed
test_cases.expected_result: Horn_Switch_Pressed remains consistently 1 in all frames

test_cases.title: Verify signal stability while horn remains released
steps: Do not press horn for 5 seconds

test_cases.title: Verify no invalid values transmitted
Verify GW propagates horn active to GWS_Horn_Active
test_cases.precondition: Ignition ON; GW active; monitor CAN ID 0x400
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_hrn_008_gw_active(can_bus):
    msg = wait_for_message(can_bus, GW_MSG_ID, timeout=2.0)
    val = get_bit(msg.data, 17)
    assert val == 1, f"Expected GWS_Horn_Active=1, got {val}"

test_cases.title: Verify GW clears GWS_Horn_Active when horn released
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_hrn_009_gw_inactive(can_bus):
    msg = wait_for_message(can_bus, GW_MSG_ID, timeout=2.0)
    val = get_bit(msg.data, 17)
    assert val == 0, f"Expected GWS_Horn_Active=0, got {val}"

test_cases.title: Verify multiple press/release cycles correctly transmit
test_cases.expected_result: Each press = 1; each release = 0 with no missed transitions
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_hrn_010_multiple_cycles(can_bus):
    msgs = collect_messages(can_bus, IC_MSG_ID, duration=5.0)
    values = [get_bit(m.data, 0) for m in msgs]
    transitions = sum(1 for i in range(1, len(values)) if values[i] != values[i - 1])
    assert transitions >= 10
